text.title: Rails Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the codebase already on Trailblazer / Interactor / Dry::Transaction?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — stick to existing paradigm; mixing two service abstractions is worse than one

branch.question: Has the codebase a single canonical ServiceResult class?

conclusion.verdict: introduce canonical ServiceResult + CI guard before extracting more services

branch.question: Is Pundit verify_authorized enabled in ApplicationController?

conclusion.verdict: enable verify_authorized + verify_policy_scoped; backfill authorize on every controller action
move dispatch to after_commit / outbox / chained Sidekiq; never mid-transaction
apply remaining rules — Bullet + Brakeman + bundler-audit in CI

text.example: existing_paradigm=none → single_service_result=true → pundit_enforced=true → has_side_effect=true → side-effects-after-commit → move InvoiceMailer.deliver_later into after_create_commit callback.
